steps.title: Find the width of the rectangular base
steps.content:
The base area is the product of length and width. We have:
$$\text{Base area} = l \times w$$
$$24t = \frac{8}{3} \times w$$
Divide both sides by $\frac{8}{3}$:
$$w = 24t \div \frac{8}{3} = 24t \times \frac{3}{8} = \frac{72t}{8} = 9t \text{ cm}$$
Now we have all three dimensions: length $= \frac{8}{3}$ cm, width $= 9t$ cm, height $= 15$ cm.

steps.title: Calculate surface area using the rectangular prism formula
steps.content:
Calculate each face pair:
  • $lw = \frac{8}{3} \times 9t = \frac{72t}{3} = 24t$
  • $lh = \frac{8}{3} \times 15 = \frac{120}{3} = 40$
  • $wh = 9t \times 15 = 135t$

Sum the three pairs:
$$lw + lh + wh = 24t + 40 + 135t = 159t + 40$$
Multiply by 2:
$$SA = 2(159t + 40) = 318t + 80$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
